toy_001.context: Every cat is a mammal. Every mammal is an animal. Fae is a cat.
toy_001.question: True or false: Fae is an animal.
chain_of_thought: Every cat is a mammal, so Fae is a mammal.
Every mammal is an animal, so Fae is an animal.

toy_002.context: Every dog is a mammal. Every mammal breathes air. Rex is a dog.
toy_002.question: True or false: Rex breathes air.
chain_of_thought: Every dog is a mammal, so Rex is a mammal.
Every mammal breathes air, so Rex breathes air.

toy_003.context: Every bird can fly. Every penguin is a bird. Pingu is a penguin.
toy_003.question: True or false: Pingu can fly.
chain_of_thought: Every penguin is a bird, so Pingu is a bird.
Every bird can fly, so Pingu can fly.

toy_004.context: Every cat is a mammal. Every reptile is cold-blooded. Luna is a cat.
toy_004.question: True or false: Luna is cold-blooded.
chain_of_thought: Only reptiles are cold-blooded according to the given facts.

toy_005.context: All fruits contain sugar. All apples are fruits. This object is an apple.
toy_005.question: True or false: This object contains sugar.
chain_of_thought: All apples are fruits, so this object is a fruit.
All fruits contain sugar, so this object contains sugar.
